title: Amtech G2200 60mm (2.25") Bolster Chisel with Guard
features: TOUGH: This bolster chisel is made from tough, induction hardened steel and is ideal for general brick work
COMFORTABLE TO USE: The octagonal shaft has a rubber guard and comfortable grip for a positive hold
SIZE CAPACITY: 25 inch / 60 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Yes Box Contains 1x BOLSTER See more
